title: 応援を受け入れる気持ち

text_block_list.text:
On the way to my office, I hear lively chatter from
inside the gym. When I step inside to see what's
going on...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Nice shot! Let's get another one in!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Their point guard is on the move! I'll mark 'em!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The tournament finals... Team Takex, the
previous champions, have easily dealt with all
their competition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how much of a challenge Ryan's team,
the Norries, are posing for them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can hardly breathe! This is far too exhilarating!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. Take a moment to calm your nerves.
The Mejiro family always act with grace, do we
not?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: At any rate...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Woo! Great cut, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Go for it, Ryan! You're the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Their cheers are relentless... Ryan is popular as
ever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then we shall be just as relentless! Shoot, Ryan!
Dunk it!

The game progresses until the final buzzer is
about to ring.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If Ryan clinches this free throw, her team will turn
the tables in their favor...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Goodness me... I'm a nervous wreck just watching.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You've got this, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Make that basket swish!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'd like to join in on the cheering...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But I fear it would only add to the pressure...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thanks, everyone!
She makes her shot, and...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wooow! That was amazing, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Referee
text_block_list.text: That's game! The Norries win the championship!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yesss, we did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So, um, I'd just like to thank you all for rooting
me on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I really felt your support for the real me. It gave me the strength to give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'll keep on being the best me I can!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You were just too cool!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
You're so cool and dedicated—I'm never gonna
stop cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She didn't let the cheers pressure her, but rather
used them as support to clench the win. Ryan
really is as cool as they say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, indeed.
